description:
Wind Power LLC imports precision bearings from a German supplier who invoices in EUR. Your job is to process a foreign currency purchase and its payment, recording an exchange gain.

1. Create a EUR-denominated Purchase Invoice for supplier 'Schmidt Industrietechnik GmbH'. Add item: 25 × 'Precision Bearing' at €40.00 each (€1,000 total).
2. Submit the Purchase Invoice. (The currency should auto-set to EUR and exchange rate to 1.10 USD/EUR).
3. From the submitted invoice, click Create > Payment Entry.
4. In the Payment Entry, change the exchange rate to 1.08 (simulating a stronger USD on the payment date).
5. Ensure the Difference Amount is written off/allocated to the Exchange Gain/Loss account, then submit the Payment Entry.

Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
